title: Mystical Biomes
description: Adds a bunch of new biomes with new trees, new wood, and a special Table for each biome
body: This mod adds a whole lot of stuff to minecraft from new biomes that have new wood blocks with new types of crafting tables for each biome and new structures! A new crafting table example is the Metal Extractor when you put 8 Iron Gold or Copper and you get a refund for the items you accidently smelted! Also by "new wood blocks" I mean a whole new type of wood so there are new fences new fence gates new doors and more! I made this mod to add new variety to minecraft! Also theres more biomes coming thats why its in alpha!
